name: Sweet'n' Sour Sauced Pork Bbs
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Carrot (cut thinly with a slant cut)
1 small Green Bell Pepper (seeded and cut into strips)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the carrot thinly with a slant cut and seed the green bell pepper, cutting into strips.
2. Partially freeze the pork and slice into bite-size pieces.
3. Preheat a 10-inch microwave browning dish on 100% power for 5 minutes.
4. Add cooking oil and sesame oil to the dish. Swirl to coat the dish.
5. Add the pork and cook, covered, on 100% power for 2-3 minutes or until no longer pink, stirring every minute.
6. Stir in sliced carrot, green pepper strips, and sliced green onions. Cook, covered, on 100% power for 2-4 minutes more or until vegetables are crisp-tender.
7. Drain off liquid.
8. In a 2-cup measure, stir together brown sugar and cornstarch. Stir in water, red wine vinegar, soy sauce, and ground ginger.
9. Cook, uncovered, on 100% power for 1 1/2 to 2 1/2 minutes or until thickened and bubbly, stirring every 30 seconds.
10. Stir in drained pineapple chunks. Cook, uncovered, on 100% power for about 45 seconds more or until heated through.
11. Toss the pineapple mixture with the pork mixture.
12. Serve with cooked rice.
